title: sabulina stolonifera
intro: Sabulina stolonifera, also known as Sea Sandwort or Sea Bladderwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sabulina stolonifera include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
